x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Performance Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Focuses on profitability and financial strength.

Includes:

CAMELS Rating System: A global standard used by regulators to rank banks from 1 (best) to 5 (worst):
Capital Adequacy, Asset Quality, Management, Earnings, Liquidity, Sensitivity to Market Risk

Profitability Ratios: Assessing how efficiently the bank generates income.

Net Interest Margin (NIM): The difference between interest earned on loans and interest paid on deposits.

Return on Assets (ROA) / Return on Equity (ROE).

Efficiency Ratio: Measures the cost of running the bank versus its income. A lower ratio is generally better.

Cost-to-Income Ratio
Loan & Deposit Growth

x-enumeration-literals.name: Risk-Based Performance Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Evaluates how effectively risks are managed.

Includes:
Credit Risk (Non-Performing Loans ratio)
Market Risk
Liquidity Risk
Operational Risk
Capital Adequacy Ratio (CAR)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Operational Performance Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Measures efficiency of internal processes.

Includes:
Transaction accuracy rate
Loan processing turnaround time
Cost control
Staff productivity
Digital banking adoption rate

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sales & Business Performance Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Common in retail and corporate banking.

Includes:
Sales target achievement
New account openings
Cross-selling ratio
Portfolio growth
Fee-based income generation

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Performance Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Focuses on service quality.

Includes:
Customer Satisfaction Score (CSAT)
Net Promoter Score (NPS)
Complaint resolution time
Customer retention rate

x-enumeration-literals.name: Individual Employee Performance Appraisal Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Used for staff promotions and bonuses.

Includes:
KPI-based appraisal
360-degree feedback
Management by Objectives (MBO)
Behavioral competency assessment

x-enumeration-literals.name: Balanced Scorecard Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A strategic performance evaluation system that combines:
Financial perspective
Customer perspective
Internal process perspective
Learning & growth perspective
